chunks.title: The Crisis of the Wicked
chunks.reason: Asaph describes his struggle with envy regarding the prosperity of the wicked and his confusion until entering God's sanctuary.

chunks.title: The Fate of the Wicked and the Believer
chunks.reason: The psalmist contrasts the sudden destruction of the wicked with God's sustaining guidance for the righteous.

chunks.title: The Goodness of Nearness to God
chunks.reason: Asaph concludes with a declaration that God alone is his portion and refuge, summarizing the lesson learned.
